member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.AgentId
member.summary: Target agent ID for multi-agent delegation. When set, the MultiAgentOrchestrator dispatches this step as an AgentMessage to the named agent instead of executing it with a local tool.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.IsHighRisk
member.summary: When true the executor must obtain approval via IEscalationService before running this step. Set by the LLM planner for steps that write data, call external APIs, send messages, or delete anything.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.Condition
member.summary: Expression evaluated before this step runs. Step is skipped when false. Syntax: WorkflowState['key'] == value | != value | > N | < N | CONTAINS substring

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.ElseStepId
member.summary: Name of the step to route to when evaluates false. If omitted and condition is false the step is simply skipped.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.IsLoopStart
member.summary: Marks this step as the start of a repeating loop body.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.IsLoopEnd
member.summary: Marks this step as the end of a loop body. When is still true after this step the executor jumps back to the step after the matching loop-start and increments WorkflowState['iteration'].

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.LoopCondition
member.summary: Condition re-evaluated after each loop iteration. Syntax: "iteration < N" | "iteration <= N" | WorkflowState expression. Loop stops when this evaluates false (or after 1000 iterations).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.LoopStartId
member.summary: Name of the corresponding step. Required on loop-end steps so the executor can locate the loop body.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.StepCondition.DependsOn
member.summary: Step IDs this condition checks for completion (StepDependencyCheck type).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.AutonomyAwarePlanner
member.summary: Wraps any IPlanner and applies autonomy-level gating before returning the plan. Set context.Metadata["autonomy.allowDynamicPlanning"] = true to enable dynamic step injection.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.CognitivePlanner
member.summary: Deliberative planner that runs three LLM passes: initial plan → self-critique → revision. Produces higher-quality plans at the cost of 2-3x more LLM calls. Inherits prompt construction and JSON parsing from LlmPlanner.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.InternalPlanner
member.summary:
Deterministic fallback planner — no LLM required.
Algorithm: 1. Tokenize context.Prompt.UserPrompt into lowercase words (>2 chars). 2. Score each registered tool/module-tool by counting token hits across its Name and Description fields. 3. Emit only tools with score > 0, ordered by score descending. 4. When no prompt is present (or no tool matches), emit all tools in registration order so the runtime always has steps to execute.
Module tools are included alongside registry tools; both are scored the same way. Steps are always sequential — parallelism requires LLM-based intent understanding.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.InternalPlanner.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Splits text on whitespace and punctuation, lowercases, deduplicates, and drops tokens shorter than 3 characters (eliminates most English stop-words).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.InternalPlanner.Score(System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Counts how many query tokens appear in the concatenation of the supplied fields. Case-insensitive substring match — "read" matches "ReadFile", "reader", etc.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.LlmPlanner
member.summary: LLM-driven planner. Injects tool descriptions + RAG/memory context into the prompt, calls ILlmClient, and parses the JSON plan response. Subclass and override BuildSystemPrompt / ParsePlan to customise behaviour.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.NullLogger
member.summary: No-op logger used when no ILogger is injected.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.ManualPlanner
member.summary:
Executes a plan supplied directly as a Plan object or as a JSON string. No LLM, no code-authored planner — the caller owns the plan entirely.
Use cases: • Developer testing without an LLM • Replaying a logged plan from a previous run • Accepting an LLM-generated plan JSON from an external system • Integration tests with deterministic, file-based plans
